title: Keto Mexican Midnight Tacos
description: A low-carb twist on traditional tacos, featuring midnight-colored beef and topped with crispy slaw and a squeeze of fresh lemon.

ingredients.name: Crispy Slaw (made with midnight lettuce, lime juice, and Mexican cheese)

instructions: In a large skillet, cook ground beef over medium-high heat, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
Add cumin, chili powder, salt, and pepper to the skillet and stir to combine.
Using a slotted spoon, transfer the cooked beef to a bowl and set aside.
In the same skillet, add the crispy slaw and cook for 2-3 minutes, until slightly softened.
To assemble the tacos, place a scoop of the beef onto a low-carb taco shell, followed by a spoonful of the crispy slaw.
Squeeze a sliver of lime juice over the top and sprinkle with Mexican cheese.
Repeat with remaining ingredients and serve immediately.
